deck_name: 生物領域＿科展生物科得獎策略全解析_網頁簡報
goal: 將生物科展得獎策略完整轉化為教師可播放、學生可自學的科研教學簡報。

deck_context.source_summary: 分析第65屆全國科展、2026 TISF與ISEF生物相關得獎作品，說明競賽如何由現象描述轉向機制、因果、定量與跨域，並提出師生可採行的選題、研究、溝通與倫理策略。
deck_context.core_claim: 頂尖生物科展的勝負不在昂貴設備或新奇現象，而在能否用真實紀錄、嚴謹控制、多重證據與跨域方法，將在地觀察推進為可驗證的因果機制。

sample_generation_method.prompt_source: conversation-approved direct sample prompt for Slide 28
sample_generation_method.approved_sample_path: /Users/froglssh/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-frog@lssh.tp.edu.tw/我的雲端硬碟/0AI應用/0 AI輔助專題與科展/生物領域＿科展生物科得獎策略全解析_網頁簡報/origin_image/slide_28.png
sample_generation_method.input_context_preparation: Inspect the approved sample as a style reference before generation. There are no strict source images. Use edit --image only for repairs.
sample_generation_method.handoff_rule: Use the same backend, tool, model, size and quality. Use generate for new slides; use edit only for repairs.

style.name: 科研教學資訊圖風
style.visual_direction: formal but approachable Taiwanese science classroom presentation; evidence-first biological infographics; realistic scientific diagrams; strong reading order; useful for teacher projection and student self-study
style.color_palette: white or very light gray background; deep academic blue #0B3A6E for structure; teal #0F766E for validation; amber #F59E0B for warnings; sparing red for failed mechanisms; dark gray text
style.typography: large high-contrast Traditional Chinese sans-serif; bold titles; clear module labels; medium body density; exact readable Chinese
style.texture_and_finish: clean flat academic infographic with subtle borders and shadows; no decorative gradients; no commercial stock-photo look
style.deck_consistency: match the approved Slide 28 palette, typography mood, density, scientific icon language and crisp finish while varying layout by semantic role

approved_style_reference.path: /Users/froglssh/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-frog@lssh.tp.edu.tw/我的雲端硬碟/0AI應用/0 AI輔助專題與科展/生物領域＿科展生物科得獎策略全解析_網頁簡報/origin_image/slide_28.png
approved_style_reference.fidelity: match palette, typography, density and scientific illustration language only; do not copy its exact three-column layout

global_constraints: Use Traditional Chinese exactly and legibly.
Keep visible text concise but preserve every listed fact, work number and numeric result.

Use only facts explicitly listed in the slide key points and local context; do not invent extra assays, sample types, instruments, diseases, doses, time points, statistical values, experimental results or causal claims.
No slide number, watermark, unrelated logo, invented institution mark or decorative nonsense.
Do not repeat the same layout on adjacent slides.
Scientific visuals must explain the content rather than decorate it.

slides.title: 科展生物科得獎策略全解析
slides.intent: Establish the shift from observation to mechanism and a serious teaching tone.
key_points: 生物領域
從現象描述到機制解析的典範轉移
以指導老師與國際評審視角整合
臺北市麗山高中林獻升老師整理

local_context.required_background: Cover only. Emphasize progression from field observation to cells, data and international competition.

layout.composition: Large left-aligned title, compact subtitle and author line, right-side vertical research evolution illustration.

visual_elements.main_visual: Ecology specimen, cell mechanism, data chart and international science-fair stage connected as one research evolution path.

constraints: Keep cover text sparse and exact.

slides.title: 全章地圖：八個層次看懂得獎規律
slides.intent: Show the complete learning path.
key_points: 認識論轉向
評鑑體系
高中五大子領域
國小與國中
國際科展
勝利方程式
師生戰略
行動藍圖

local_context.required_background: Eight ordered sections form a climb from understanding judging to taking action.

layout.composition: Eight-stop ascending route with short labels and a start-to-summit reading order.

visual_elements.main_visual: Academic mountain route with eight restrained milestone nodes.

slides.title: 生物科展的認識論轉向
slides.intent: Contrast the fading old paradigm with the winning new paradigm.
key_points: 第65屆全國科展、2026 TISF、ISEF共同趨勢
自然觀察與現象描述正失去頂尖優勢
新範式：機制探討、精確量化、跨領域整合

local_context.required_background: Old paradigm is museum-style observation. New paradigm is quasi-academic multi-scale explanation.

layout.composition: Before-and-after split with an arrow of epistemic transition and bottom takeaway.

visual_elements.main_visual: Field notebook and magnifier on the left; multi-scale cell, instrument and data model on the right.

slides.title: 從「A 影響 B」走向 Why 與 How
slides.intent: Teach the depth progression expected by judges.
key_points: 必須回答路徑、分子機制與物理條件
What → 變因隔離 → Why／How → 多重驗證
評審重視解釋力，不只現象新奇

local_context.required_background: A and B are generic variables. Show correlation as a black box and mechanism as a transparent chain.

layout.composition: Left black-box correlation, center four-step transformation, right transparent causal chain.

visual_elements.main_visual: A→B black box opening into pathway, molecule, physical condition and triangulated evidence.

slides.title: 技術護城河，與回歸基本面
slides.intent: Balance advanced techniques with integrity and process.
key_points: WGS、ERG、TEM、Tet-On、心理物理技術已進入高中科展
高階工具形成技術降維打擊
實驗日誌危機讓真實失敗與原始紀錄重新成為核心

local_context.required_background: The message is not anti-technology. Winning requires both technical capability and trustworthy process.

layout.composition: Central balance scale: advanced instruments versus authentic notebook; bridge statement beneath.

visual_elements.main_visual: Scientific instruments and gene tools balanced against a detailed handwritten lab notebook.

slides.title: 官方評審四大維度
slides.intent: Convert the official table into a practical judging compass.
key_points: 研究主題：小題目、深挖掘與鄉土相關性
創意價值：方法論借用、轉化與專利潛力
科學方法：對照、樣本數與推論統計
展示表達：實驗日誌具有一票否決效力

local_context.required_background: All four official dimensions must retain their practical biological meaning.

layout.composition: Four-quadrant compass with distinct scientific icons and a central label 評審實質運作.

visual_elements.main_visual: Topic target, cross-domain spark, controlled experiment, authentic notebook.

slides.title: 評審心中的那把尺
slides.intent: Reveal the four hidden decision filters.
key_points: 機制優先：效果必須追到光敏素、酵素或基因
數據衛生：有效位數、誤差棒、P值與測量極限
誠實失敗：能說明困難、推理與修正
日誌否決權：鉛筆、空白、補謄、過度美化都可能淘汰

local_context.required_background: These filters decide award level beyond the formal score.

layout.composition: Four sequential judge filters narrowing a broad field to a winning project.

visual_elements.main_visual: Mechanism lens, clean chart, failure-repair loop and integrity notebook.

slides.title: 高中組總覽：五大子領域的共同升級
slides.intent: Preview five fields and their winning upgrades.
key_points: 動物與醫學：分子機制與轉譯醫學
植物：生物物理與仿生工程
農業與食品：臨床規格與循環經濟
行為與社會：客觀生理與計算
環境：精密量化與治理閉環

local_context.required_background: Five fields share the shift toward mechanism, quantification and cross-domain methods.

layout.composition: Five-petal research map around a central label 機制×定量×跨域.

visual_elements.main_visual: Cell, leaf, food microbe, brain-behavior and ecosystem icons.

slides.title: SLC35C1：完整癌症機制鏈
slides.intent: Demonstrate complete molecular reasoning.
key_points: 第一名｜作品052014
SLC35C1 → 岩藻糖化 → 遷移侵襲 → 骨髓微環境 → 骨轉移
醣生物學與細胞共培養建立完整證據鏈

local_context.required_background: SLC35C1 is a Golgi membrane transporter. Show marrow osteoclast/osteoblast microenvironment without clinical sensationalism.

layout.composition: Horizontal five-stage molecular pathway with evidence callouts and a right-side award insight.

visual_elements.main_visual: Golgi transporter, fucosylated proteins, migrating cancer cell and bone microenvironment.

slides.title: TAOK1：Tet-On 的劑量與時間效應
slides.intent: Show rigorous variable control.
key_points: 第二名｜作品052007
多西環素精確控制基因開關與表現量
不只比較有／無，更研究劑量與時間
連結神經退化、精神疾病與BDNF代償保護

local_context.required_background: TAOK1 is a kinase. BDNF increase is interpreted as a possible compensatory protective mechanism, not a proven cure.

layout.composition: Adjustable gene switch left, dose-time response matrix center, neural interpretation right.

visual_elements.main_visual: Tet-On switch, dose curve, clock and neural network.

slides.title: 腫瘤新抗原：乾實驗先行
slides.intent: Teach efficient dry-wet integration.
key_points: 第三名｜作品052009
NetMHCcons從大數據預測候選抗原
In Silico → In Vitro
降低盲目嘗試成本並提升規劃成熟度

local_context.required_background: Dry computation prioritizes candidates; wet cell work validates them.

layout.composition: Funnel workflow from database and algorithm to ranked antigens, cell validation and vaccine concept.

visual_elements.main_visual: Data cloud, computational filter, antigen ranking and culture dish.

slides.title: 浮萍：生態、物理與分子三尺度
slides.intent: Show how one biological phenomenon can be explained across scales.
key_points: 第一名｜作品052106
麥片圈效應解釋表面張力群聚
光週期—光敏素—POD／ROS—連結數
宏觀季節消長＋中觀物理＋微觀訊號

local_context.required_background: Duckweed seasonal dynamics are linked to surface-tension aggregation and molecular light responses.

layout.composition: Three stacked scales: pond ecology, water-surface physics, cell signaling; connected vertically.

visual_elements.main_visual: Duckweed clusters, meniscus forces, phytochrome and ROS balance.

slides.title: 從海漂果實到軟體機器人
slides.intent: Compare two forms of biomimetic innovation.
key_points: 銀葉樹果實｜第二名052101：龍骨、浮心、海流裝置
颱風草｜第三名052105：泡狀細胞、摺疊角度、氣動仿生
形態學因工程與演化視角重獲解釋力

local_context.required_background: Do not merge the two cases. One treats fruit as a biological ship; the other treats leaf folding as a soft-robot prototype.

layout.composition: Mirrored left-right case panels with a shared central label 仿生工程.

visual_elements.main_visual: Floating fruit cross-section and pneumatic folded-leaf prototype.

slides.title: 益生菌：從食品分離走到臨床規格
slides.intent: Show product safety and mechanism as one chain.
key_points: 第一名｜作品052207
傷口試驗區分細胞遷移與細胞增殖
WGS確認菌株不含抗藥基因
菌株篩選—安全評估—分子機制

local_context.required_background: The probiotic is Lactiplantibacillus plantarum isolated from food; avoid making medical treatment claims beyond the study.

layout.composition: Three linked evidence stations with one final translational-value takeaway.

visual_elements.main_visual: Probiotic colony, scratch-wound assay and genome safety check.

slides.title: 果蠅眼科模型與循環經濟
slides.intent: Compare two smart research-resource strategies.
key_points: 牛樟芝｜第三名052209：果蠅＋ERG＋TEM
低等模型規避倫理限制，高等檢測保證深度
作品052206：畜牧廢水 → 微藻 → 作物刺激素
臨床規格與SDGs系統閉環

local_context.required_background: Left case is diabetic retinopathy model. Right case is circular agriculture.

layout.composition: Two large contrasting strategy windows joined by a bottom label 聰明的資源配置.

visual_elements.main_visual: Fly eye electrophysiology and TEM versus circular waste-algae-crop loop.

slides.title: 把主觀時間感轉成毫秒級數據
slides.intent: Demonstrate hard-science treatment of behavior.
key_points: 第一名｜作品052713
短影片速度、色調、情緒影響注意與時間知覺
Psytoolkit記錄反應時間與正確率
注意力門控、內部時鐘、Greenhouse-Geisser校正

local_context.required_background: Target population is female high-school students. Emphasize objective task data over opinion survey.

layout.composition: Phone stimulus sequence, internal-clock model and reaction-time/statistics panel.

visual_elements.main_visual: Short-video frames, timing task, millisecond clock and corrected plot.

slides.title: 神經工具改寫社會科學
slides.intent: Show objective physiological evidence replacing survey-only designs.
key_points: 第二名052708：斑馬魚酒精成癮＋晶球給藥
第三名052705：EEG Gamma波驗證冗餘原則
技術創新解決操作瓶頸
神經藥理與神經教育進入高中科展

local_context.required_background: Keep addiction model and educational neuroscience visually separate.

layout.composition: Diagonal dual-scene layout with a central objective-evidence bridge.

visual_elements.main_visual: Zebrafish behavior tank and classroom EEG waveform.

slides.title: 927棵樹：校園固碳閉環
slides.intent: Show completeness from census to policy.
key_points: 第一名｜作品052608
全校927棵樹地毯式普查
IPCC標準參數＋Li-6400微觀生理驗證
宏觀普查 → 微觀驗證 → 碳中和政策

local_context.required_background: The key is not only the count but cross-validation of macro estimates with physiological measurement.

layout.composition: Campus tree map left, carbon calculation center, Li-6400 validation and policy card right.

visual_elements.main_visual: Tree canopy map, carbon flow, photosynthesis instrument and policy arrow.

slides.title: 相關性不等於因果性
slides.intent: Teach why creativity cannot substitute for mechanism evidence.
key_points: 第三名警示案例｜作品052610
酸性溫泉殺孑孓具創意與在地性
硫酸根轉二氧化硫缺乏直接證據
只有死亡現象，不能宣稱特定致死機制

local_context.required_background: Use an explicit broken causal link. Do not claim the proposed sulfur mechanism is true.

layout.composition: Observation on left, unsupported mechanism in center with warning break, required direct evidence on right.

visual_elements.main_visual: Larvae, hot-spring chemistry path and missing-evidence warning.

slides.title: 國小與國中：兩條進階路線
slides.intent: Frame age-appropriate excellence without ranking one above the other.
key_points: 國小：社會實踐、行動科學、真實問題
國中：生理機制、生物物理、精密量化
共同方向：從描述走向可操作、可驗證

local_context.required_background: Primary students move from observer to actor; junior-high students move toward mechanism and precision.

layout.composition: Two parallel ascending paths converging at 可驗證的科學解答.

visual_elements.main_visual: Community action path and precision laboratory path.

slides.title: 睡前娛樂：模型推翻主觀自信
slides.intent: Show dual-track validation.
key_points: 第一名080309｜新北市中山國小
問卷揭露認知偏差
ICR小鼠：對照、探索、飲食吸引、藍光四組
水迷宮等行為測驗
藍光組尋台時間多163%，並有社交退縮

local_context.required_background: Do not imply direct human causality from mice; present the model as objective evidence complementing the survey.

layout.composition: Survey belief card versus four-group mouse experiment, ending in numeric evidence badge.

visual_elements.main_visual: Bedtime phone, four mouse groups, water maze and 163% indicator.

slides.title: 潮間貝包客：調查、毒理與復育
slides.intent: Show progression from baseline survey to intervention.
key_points: 第二名080307｜新北市竹圍國小
淡水河口至社子島頭9公里、10樣區
紅樹蜆鉛為水體33倍、汞100倍
空心磚微棲地操作性復育

local_context.required_background: Emphasize bioaccumulation evidence and active habitat intervention.

layout.composition: Horizontal estuary map with sampling nodes, central metal-ratio bars and right restoration experiment.

visual_elements.main_visual: Estuary transect, clam and heavy-metal multipliers, hollow-brick habitat.

slides.title: 鰻苗混獲走向政策協作
slides.intent: Show action science and partnership.
key_points: 第三名080301｜屏東縣墾丁國小
PES生態系服務付費與漁民補償
救援數量超過目標物種捕獲量
與NGO合作形成政策建議
延伸：蘆薈、山蟻、飛機噪音等在地研究

local_context.required_background: Connect to SDG14 and SDG17. Keep supporting cases as a compact strip, not equal visual weight.

layout.composition: Central stakeholder network with a bottom strip of three additional local-action examples.

visual_elements.main_visual: Students, fishers, NGO, rescued bycatch and policy document.

slides.title: 長足衛蜈蚣：長週期系統性生物學
slides.intent: Value patient, systematic natural-history work when quantified rigorously.
key_points: 第一名030302｜臺南市長榮中學國中部
克服肉食性土壤動物飼養瓶頸
卵、八個幼齡期到成蟲完整生活史
Type II生存曲線
領域大小與主場優勢

local_context.required_background: This is a local centipede-like soil predator, Scutigera-type long-legged centipede.

layout.composition: Life-history timeline across top, survival curve and territorial experiment below.

visual_elements.main_visual: Development stages, Type II curve and standardized arena.

slides.title: 大刀螳螂：精密量測挑戰教科書
slides.intent: Show how instruments can challenge a familiar biological classification.
key_points: 第二名030312｜南投縣宏仁國中
低氧高碳下呼吸速率暴增近400%
體溫平均高於環境約2.79°C
挑戰外溫動物的傳統定義
連結廢氣與暖化

local_context.required_background: Present the finding as evidence suggesting thermoregulation, not final textbook revision.

layout.composition: Large mantis thermal image center, gas-response chart left, interpretation ladder right.

visual_elements.main_visual: Infrared mantis silhouette, gas detector and 400%/2.79°C data callouts.

slides.title: 國小與國中的工具、統計與社會連結
slides.intent: Preserve the source table's six dimensions in a readable visual matrix.
key_points: 核心目標：行動科學 vs 生理機制
選題：生活廣度 vs 聚焦深度
設計：雙軌與介入 vs 精密控制
工具：調查測驗 vs 熱像、氣體、Tracker、GeoGebra
統計：描述性 vs t-test／ANOVA
社會連結：直接改善 vs 理論基礎

local_context.required_background: Six comparison rows must all remain visible and readable.

layout.composition: Two-column, six-row comparison matrix with icons and highlighted differences.

visual_elements.main_visual: Structured academic comparison matrix, no tiny text.

slides.title: 國際科展：如何證明因果
slides.intent: Raise the standard from experiment quantity to causal proof and scientific compression.
key_points: 評審核心問題：如何證明A直接導致B
2026 TISF海報面積縮為往年60%
從龐雜數據篩選新穎且有說服力的核心證據
建立清晰科學敘事

local_context.required_background: The 60% figure refers to display area relative to prior years.

layout.composition: Large evidence funnel compressing many results into three decisive panels, with 60% poster frame.

visual_elements.main_visual: Data wall, selection funnel, concise international poster.

slides.title: 因果驗證黃金標準
slides.intent: Approved sample slide; teach loss-of-function, rescue and mechanistic check.
key_points: 功能喪失：移除A → B消失
救援：回補A → B恢復
機制檢驗：回補失活突變體 → B不恢復
Naa40催化失活突變體無法救援神經管缺陷
關鍵是Naa40的酵素活性，不是蛋白結構本身

local_context.required_background: This is the approved sample. Preserve the existing final image and do not regenerate.

layout.composition: Existing approved three-stage process with case strip and conclusion band.

visual_elements.main_visual: Existing approved Slide 28 image.

slides.title: Scny：克隆分析與內部對照
slides.intent: Show advanced internal-control design and translational reasoning.
key_points: TISF青少年科學獎・動物
UAS-Gal4＋CD2 FLP-out建立同一卵巢內部對照
Scny缺失 → H3K4Me3累積 → 多核化
連結PGCCs並提出潛在抗癌靶點

local_context.required_background: Scny is a deubiquitinase. Internal control means mutant and wild-type cells coexist in one ovary.

layout.composition: Ovary mosaic at center, internal-control logic left, epigenetic-to-cancer chain right.

visual_elements.main_visual: Drosophila ovary mosaic, H3K4Me3 marks and polyploid cells.

slides.title: 仿免疫突觸微流體晶片
slides.intent: Show fluid mechanics solving a clinical cell-sorting bottleneck.
key_points: TISF一等獎・醫學
模擬免疫突觸的微流體晶片
剪切力保留高結合力特異性T細胞
富集20倍且細胞活性良好

local_context.required_background: Traditional flow or magnetic sorting struggles with extremely rare cells. The device selects by adhesion strength under calibrated shear.

layout.composition: Cutaway microfluidic channel across center with problem, mechanism and outcome zones.

visual_elements.main_visual: T cells flowing through immune-synapse-like microstructures under shear force.

slides.title: AI賦能的BCD評估平台
slides.intent: Show non-destructive high-throughput gene-editing assessment.
key_points: TISF二等獎・醫學
患者iPSC＋eVLPs先導編輯＋RPE細胞
CNN以明視野影像預測修復程度
相關係數0.93
非標記、非破壞、高通量

local_context.required_background: BCD is an inherited retinal disease context. Do not invent performance metrics beyond correlation 0.93.

layout.composition: Pipeline from patient cells to editing, brightfield image, CNN and repair score dashboard.

visual_elements.main_visual: RPE microscopy tiles, neural network and 0.93 correlation plot.

slides.title: 鑑定脂滴自噬受體
slides.intent: Show basic-science gap filling through genetic screening.
key_points: TISF一等獎・生化
酵母基因敲除篩出Ayr1、Hfd1
微自噬與巨自噬共同參與脂滴降解
釐清標記與運輸必要性

local_context.required_background: Use yeast cellular context and distinguish microautophagy from macroautophagy.

layout.composition: Central lipid droplet branching into two autophagy pathways, with receptor labels and knockout evidence.

visual_elements.main_visual: Yeast cell, lipid droplet, Ayr1/Hfd1 tags and dual degradation routes.

slides.title: ISEF：乾濕整合、綠色化學與資源現實
slides.intent: Synthesize research excellence, access and independence.
key_points: dmPGE2使軸突再生增加126%，結合RNA Scope與GWAS
Aza-C-核苷以生物質糠醇降低Galidesivir成本
細胞與分子生物學大會獎率43%
約65%獲獎者有專業實驗室資源
評審嚴查學生獨立貢獻

local_context.required_background: Keep the neural-regeneration and green-chemistry cases separate. Percentages describe award outcomes/resources, not causal guarantees.

layout.composition: Two case panels on top, resource/independence evidence dashboard below.

visual_elements.main_visual: Regenerating axon with GWAS, green synthesis route, 43% and 65% evidence badges.

slides.title: 勝利方程式① 日誌、機制與證據
slides.intent: Combine the first three winning principles into one actionable model.
key_points: 真實日誌：原子筆、不撕頁、邊做邊寫、保留失敗
機制路徑：What → 變因隔離 → Why／How → 多重驗證
證據三角測量：行為＋生理＋分子，或宏觀＋微觀
例：趨光、ERG、TEM、Western Blot

local_context.required_background: Notebook integrity is the foundation supporting the mechanism and evidence triangle.

layout.composition: Notebook foundation at bottom, mechanism ladder center, evidence triangle above.

visual_elements.main_visual: Authentic notebook, four-step reasoning ladder and triangulated evidence.

slides.title: 勝利方程式② 數據衛生與Glocalization
slides.intent: Join statistical rigor with local-global value.
key_points: t-test、ANOVA、回歸、誤差棒、樣本數
尊重測量精度與有效位數
在地題材：銀葉樹、牛樟芝、金山溫泉、酪農
全球議題：氣候、SDGs、抗藥性
採用IPCC等國際標準

local_context.required_background: Glocalization means local material or problem interpreted with globally relevant questions and standards.

layout.composition: Clean statistical chart system left, Taiwan-to-world connection map right, shared takeaway band.

visual_elements.main_visual: Error-bar chart, ruler for significant digits, Taiwan motifs connected to SDGs and IPCC globe.

slides.title: 頂尖作品與一般作品的六項差異
slides.intent: Create a diagnostic self-check matrix.
key_points: 研究問題：Why／How vs What
設計：因果救援 vs 相關觀察
數據：微觀定量 vs 巨觀定性
跨域：AI／物理／材料 vs 單一套件
價值：明確So What vs 貢獻模糊
呈現：科學精煉與真實日誌 vs 流水帳

local_context.required_background: All six rows must be visible. Use positive teal and caution amber/red sparingly.

layout.composition: Six-row, two-column winners-versus-general matrix with concise phrases and icons.

visual_elements.main_visual: High-contrast diagnostic comparison matrix.

slides.title: 選題策略：知識缺口與機制深度
slides.intent: Give teachers and students four promising directions and clear avoidances.
key_points: 避開綠豆光色、教科書重複與無機制相關研究
精密調控：表觀遺傳、非編碼RNA、自噬、訊息傳遞
疾病模型：果蠅、線蟲、斑馬魚
系統生理：腸—腦、腎—腸—肌、腸—肝
在地韌性：特有種、抗藥性、微塑膠

local_context.required_background: Disease-model reasoning should connect genotype, phenotype and treatment target.

layout.composition: Central avoid zone with four outward high-potential research lanes.

visual_elements.main_visual: Four scientific route cards with a small warning pit for repetitive topics.

slides.title: 乾濕閉環＋PMC機制推理
slides.intent: Turn modern research tools into a teachable workflow.
key_points: 乾實驗：AlphaFold／ColabFold、TCGA、GEO、文獻工具
濕實驗：救援與因果閉環
定量：ImageJ、DeepLabCut、誤差棒與統計
PMC：Phenomena—Mechanism—Components
跨尺度連結表型、組織、基因與蛋白

local_context.required_background: PMC is a teaching framework, not a database. Dry and wet work should form an iterative loop.

layout.composition: Large dry-wet infinity loop with a PMC three-layer model in the center.

visual_elements.main_visual: Protein prediction, public datasets, lab validation, image quantification and multi-scale PMC stack.

slides.title: 資源、溝通與學術倫理
slides.intent: Show how to gain support, communicate clearly and preserve ownership and ethics.
key_points: 先讀教授論文，再提出具體求助問題
2–3分鐘說清問題、解法、成果、影響
BioRender機制圖；誠實面對限制與負面數據
作者親做、問卷同意、動物3R、外來種防逃逸、人體IRB
不得挪用大學成果或模糊學生參與度

local_context.required_background: 3R means Replacement, Reduction, Refinement. Ethics is a hard boundary, not a decorative final note.

layout.composition: Three connected zones: mentor network, three-minute story, ethics shield with a red hard-boundary line.

visual_elements.main_visual: Teacher-student-university network, concise story arc and ethics shield.

slides.title: 像科學家思考，像工程師解題，像史學家記錄
slides.intent: End with a memorable action formula.
key_points: 新公式：在地觀察的熱情＋學術研究的嚴謹
從觀察走向機制
從相關走向因果
從單一走向跨域
不必最昂貴設備，但必須擁抱最先進思維

local_context.required_background: The three roles are scientist, engineer and historian of the research process.

layout.composition: Three-role silhouettes converging into one student researcher ascending a science summit; concise closing text.

visual_elements.main_visual: Microscope-thinking, engineering-problem-solving and honest notebook-recording converging at a summit.
